project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces) - Quant Ecosystem with device-control package
build_system: pnpm with tsc, vitest for testing
test_framework: vitest with describe/it/expect pattern, mock functions inline
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: pnpm --filter @quant/device-control run typecheck. 2. Run tests: pnpm --filter @quant/device-control run test
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 with pnpm.
contribution_requirements: Max 500 LOC per PR. All gates must pass (typecheck + tests).
key_patterns: - Capabilities defined in src/capabilities/ with types.ts defining DeviceCapability union type. - Agents in src/agents/ take config objects and handle intents. - Tests in src/__tests__/ use vitest with inline mocks (no external mock files). - Providers types in src/providers/types.ts define intent shapes. - PermissionManager handles capability access control. - Module pattern: each domain directory has an index.ts barrel export.
directory_structure: packages/device-control/src/ contains: agents/ (call-agent, message-agent), capabilities/ (phone, sms, location, etc + types), contacts/ (store, resolver, sync), permissions/ (manager, types), providers/ (twilio, native + types), audit/ (action audit), __tests__/ (vitest test files)
